Texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information visit
Texts.TrendyolSearchQueryMissing: Provide a search query or a Trendyol marketplace category id.
Texts.TrendyolCategoryNotFound: The marketplace category was not found.
Texts.TrendyolCategoryWrongMarketplace: The category does not belong to Trendyol.
Texts.TrendyolFetchExhausted: Trendyol search could not be loaded (JSON endpoints and HTML fallback failed). Check Cookie/User-Agent or try again later.
Texts.MarketplacesHepsiburadaComingSoon: Hepsiburada integration screens will be added here.
Texts.TrendyolSearchHint: Search keyword (optional if using category sync via API only)
Texts.TrendyolEmptyList: No products yet — run sync from the toolbar or use the API.
